subcodes.first_line: O divine friends! It is morning, and the Eastern Sun possesseth radiance and effulgence, and the world-illumining divine Sun [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یاران الهی صبح است و مهر خاوریرا تابش و رخششی و آفتاب جهان تاب الهی را
subcodes.subjects: @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @call to action, @the divine emanation; the all-pervading bounty of God
